author: Spyderzoe
title: Looking for Artist for Anime Frenzy X
content: 🎨 Looking for an Artist for Anime Frenzy X! We're hiring artists for our anime-inspired Roblox game. 📩 DM me with: • Portfolio (Required) • Rates/Pricing Anime/Roblox art experience is a plus!

author: Mr. DripTech
title: Seeking digital artist for Steam capsule and key art
content: I’m seeking a talented digital artist to create our Steam capsule images and key art. If you’ve worked on promotional visuals for games and are interested in collaborating, I’d love to connect and discuss rates. Let’s build something awesome together.

author: Bowlerman
title: Looking for artist for PFP and banner
content: I'm currently looking for artist to commission my pfp and banner for robux!
